violations.text: Allergen statement is lacking on menu. Establishment is to add an allergy statement to menu. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit, 1 door reach-in, ice machine, and fryolator baskets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026
The condensate from the ice machine is draining into the bar hand sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026
The 3-bay sink piping was observed with a slow leak. Establishment is to fix leak. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026
The door to the kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors must be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

The establishment is lacking outside receptacles. Establishment must have outside receptacles for the removal of trash. Receptacles must be on an area that constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Receptacles must be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026
The grout in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2026

The wall behind the mop sink is constructed of drywall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Per PIC, FRP will be put up behind mop sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

The door to the outside, located in the dining area and kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024
Missing floor tile was observed in kitchen. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen and restroom was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024

There is insufficient refrigeration equipment/capacity to maintain a temperature of 41 degrees or below. There is insufficient hot holding equipment to maintain foods at 135 degrees F or above. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024

Wood is used in the construction of ledge behind mop sink. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
Three bay sink was in poor repair, observed leak from bottom pipe. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
Toilet room in kitchen is lacking a door. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
The door to the toilet rooms in the dining area is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
Missing floor tile was observed in the ware washing area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
